text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yayyyyy! Hey, hey, guess what!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm going to be in a wedding!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So yeah! My older sister is a Tracen graduate, and
she's planning to get married here! I'm going to
help her organize everything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And that's not all!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
This academy is where it all started for me, so I
want this to be where I begin this new stage of my
life too!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
And you, my little muse, are always doing your
very best to make things exciting, and when I
looked at you, I had a thought.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Graduate
text_block_list.text:
If you helped me, my wedding would definitely be
wonderful and one to remember!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Isn't that amazing?! She made me her planner! I've gotta do my absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, I don't really know what a wonderful
wedding is supposed to be like.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm gonna go and ask everyone for
advice! I'm gonna do the best job I can for my
sister!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: A wonderful wedding should definitely be really romantic! The couple should hug each other while skydiving! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so them whooshing through the sky is what
would make the ceremony wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
They should exchange vows at an oceanside
church. But then, someone should stand up,
object to the wedding, and confess their true
love.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I've got a few romance manga with scenes like
that, if you'd like to borrow them?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The couple should arrive in a carriage to make
themselves known, accompanied by an orchestral
performance. A traditional wedding like that
would be wonderful. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A dramatic finale would be stupendous as well!
They could imbue the power of love into their
special attacks and shoot them into the sky—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so Haru Urara continues running around the
academy in an effort to gather ideas for a
wonderful wedding...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're that trainer from before! Hey, I have
an idea for the wedding!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
First, all the couple's friends fall out of the sky
together!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And then they all land in the sea! And then
everyone will greet each other while listening to
classical music!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And then, when it's time to exchange vows...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Someone dramatically objects to the marriage
and confesses their true love!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And that's when they fire their love-powered special attacks...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And go into space!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Do you think my sister will like it?!
choice_data_list:
I-I think you might need to adjust quite a lot of
that...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmmm. Really? Actually, I kinda figured.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I got all kinds of advice and suggestions, but
planning a wonderful wedding sure is tough.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I just haven't asked enough people yet! I'll
try seeing what everyone else says! This is for my
sister, so I've gotta do everything I can!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Ikuno and Curren! So I'm helping plan a
wedding, and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I have to do my best, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush to Haru Urara's side after she takes a
tumble. However...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmm... The wedding... The wedding...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She gets up on her own, then wanders off,
mumbling to herself as she goes...
